name: val_ebit_ev_ttm
rationale: Greenblatt earnings yield (EBIT/EV), TTM single-quarter flow.

name: val_fcf_ev_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q3, 1))) / (Ref($total_mv, 1) * 10000 + Ref($total_liab_q0, 1) - Ref($money_cap_q0, 1))
rationale: FCF/EV yield (TTM OCF - TTM CapEx); cross-capital-structure comparable. Replaces FCF/market-cap per GPT review.

name: val_retearn_yield
rationale: Retained-earnings yield (accumulated value vs price).

name: val_ncav_to_price
rationale: Graham NCAV / price (deep value).

name: qual_gross_profitability_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($oper_cost_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q3, 1))) / ((Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) + Ref($total_assets_q4, 1)) / 2)
rationale: Novy-Marx gross profitability (TTM gross profit / avg assets); TTM + avg-assets per GPT Round-3 (was _cum_q0/end-assets).

name: qual_margin_op_of_gr
rationale: Margin ladder member not in current catalog: op_of_gr.

name: qual_margin_ebit_of_gr
rationale: Margin ladder member not in current catalog: ebit_of_gr.

name: qual_margin_profit_to_gr
rationale: Margin ladder member not in current catalog: profit_to_gr.

name: acc_total_accruals_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($n_income_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q3, 1))) / ((Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) + Ref($total_assets_q4, 1)) / 2)
rationale: Sloan total accruals (TTM NI - TTM OCF) / avg assets; seasonality-free per GPT review.

name: acc_cash_roa_ttm
rationale: Cash ROA (TTM OCF / avg assets); cash-backed profitability.

name: acc_cfo_to_ni_ttm
qlib_expression: (Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q3, 1)) / (Ref($n_income_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_income_sq_q3, 1))
rationale: Cash-flow backing of earnings (TTM OCF / TTM NI); higher is cleaner. TTM form per GPT review (note: unstable when NI~0).

name: acc_asset_growth
rationale: Cooper asset growth; fast asset growers underperform.

name: acc_noa_scaled
rationale: Net operating assets scaled by lagged assets (Hirshleifer).

name: acc_dWC_inventory
rationale: Inventory build relative to assets; over-investment in WC.

name: acc_dWC_receivables
rationale: Receivable build; aggressive revenue recognition proxy.

name: acc_capex_intensity_ttm
rationale: CapEx intensity (TTM CapEx / avg assets); industry-neutralize (GPT review: sign not universally negative — separate from growth).

name: acc_rd_intensity_ttm
qlib_expression: (Ref($rd_exp_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($rd_exp_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($rd_exp_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($rd_exp_sq_q3, 1)) / (Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q3, 1))
rationale: R&D intensity (TTM R&D / TTM revenue); intangible-investment premium; industry/stage-neutralize.

name: acc_goodwill_ratio
rationale: Goodwill as a share of assets; impairment / overpayment risk.

name: acc_net_share_issuance
rationale: Net share issuance (negated); issuers underperform, buybacks win.

name: grow_revenue_yoy_q
rationale: Single-quarter YoY growth of revenue (same-quarter comparison).

name: grow_revenue_yoy_accel_q
rationale: YoY-growth acceleration of revenue: 1-quarter Delta of the YoY rate (GPT Round-3 fix; avoids the unmaterialized _sq_q5).

name: grow_operate_profit_yoy_q
rationale: Single-quarter YoY growth of operate_profit (same-quarter comparison).

name: grow_operate_profit_yoy_accel_q
rationale: YoY-growth acceleration of operate_profit: 1-quarter Delta of the YoY rate (GPT Round-3 fix; avoids the unmaterialized _sq_q5).

name: grow_n_income_attr_p_yoy_q
rationale: Single-quarter YoY growth of n_income_attr_p (same-quarter comparison).

name: grow_n_income_attr_p_yoy_accel_q
rationale: YoY-growth acceleration of n_income_attr_p: 1-quarter Delta of the YoY rate (GPT Round-3 fix; avoids the unmaterialized _sq_q5).

name: grow_total_revenue_yoy_q
rationale: Single-quarter YoY growth of total_revenue (same-quarter comparison).

name: grow_total_revenue_yoy_accel_q
rationale: YoY-growth acceleration of total_revenue: 1-quarter Delta of the YoY rate (GPT Round-3 fix; avoids the unmaterialized _sq_q5).

name: mom_52w_high_proximity
rationale: George-Hwang 52-week-high proximity (decay 60d per GPT review — medium-term anchor, not a 1y-stale signal).

name: mom_volscaled_20d
rationale: Volatility-scaled momentum (risk-adjusted trend).

name: mom_volscaled_60d
rationale: Volatility-scaled momentum (risk-adjusted trend).

name: mom_volscaled_120d
rationale: Volatility-scaled momentum (risk-adjusted trend).

name: risk_parkinson_logrange_20d
rationale: True Parkinson log high-low range variance (20d); fixes the range-ratio mislabel (GPT review §4) + per-window decay (§D).

name: risk_parkinson_logrange_60d
rationale: True Parkinson log high-low range variance (60d); fixes the range-ratio mislabel (GPT review §4) + per-window decay (§D).

name: risk_parkinson_logrange_120d
rationale: True Parkinson log high-low range variance (120d); fixes the range-ratio mislabel (GPT review §4) + per-window decay (§D).

name: risk_gap_vol_20d
rationale: Overnight/T+1 gap risk; distinct from intraday vol (GPT review §1).

name: liq_zero_ret_days_5d
rationale: Zero-return days (Lesmond illiquidity); Sum(If(...)) form — Qlib Count() ignores the condition in this build.

name: liq_zero_ret_days_10d
rationale: Zero-return days (Lesmond illiquidity); Sum(If(...)) form — Qlib Count() ignores the condition in this build.

name: liq_zero_ret_days_20d
rationale: Zero-return days (Lesmond illiquidity); Sum(If(...)) form — Qlib Count() ignores the condition in this build.

name: flow_elg_net_pct_5d
rationale: Extra-large order net inflow share (institutional flow); unit-corrected ($amount/10 to match 万元 moneyflow basis).

name: flow_elg_net_pct_10d
rationale: Extra-large order net inflow share (institutional flow); unit-corrected ($amount/10 to match 万元 moneyflow basis).

name: flow_elg_net_pct_20d
rationale: Extra-large order net inflow share (institutional flow); unit-corrected ($amount/10 to match 万元 moneyflow basis).

name: flow_inst_retail_divergence_20d
rationale: Institutional (large+elg) minus retail (small) net order-flow divergence; unit-corrected ($amount/10). GPT Round-3 add.

name: limit_up_hit_5d
rationale: Exact limit-board continuation candidate (Sum(If) form per F1 lint). Replaces the Count-based Round-2 row.

name: limit_down_hit_20d
rationale: Limit-down overhang / trading-interference risk (Sum(If) form per F1 lint).

name: margin_net_buy_ratio_20d
rationale: Net financing-buy intensity scaled by float cap; unit-corrected (circ_mv * 10000 to match the 元 margin basis).

name: alpha_chip_winner_rate_level
rationale: Chip-distribution winner rate level (profit-taking pressure).

name: mom_skip5d_120d
rationale: Skip-last-week 120d momentum; drops the most recent 5 days to reduce short-term-reversal / T+1-crowding contamination.

name: risk_garman_klass_20d
rationale: Garman-Klass OHLC volatility estimator; uses open-close info on top of the high-low range (GPT Round-3 add).

name: rev_turnover_spike_5d
rationale: 5d reversal conditioned on a free-float turnover spike; targets retail/crowding overreaction (GPT Round-3 add).

name: tech_high_breakout_freshness_250d
rationale: 52-week-high freshness: Qlib IdxMax is 1-indexed from the oldest bar, so higher values mean the high occurred more recently. Replaces the sign-inverted tech_high_breakout_age_250d.

name: mom_continuous_info_252d_dir
qlib_expression: Sign(Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 253) - 1) * Abs((Sum(If((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1) > 0, 1, 0), 252) - Sum(If((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1) < 0, 1, 0), 252)) / 252)
rationale: Directional information-discreteness (frog-in-the-pan); smooth trends rank by direction. GPT Round-3 sign fix + Sum(If) count fix.
